title: Subtracting decimals and whole numbers (tenths)
description: Subtract larger whole numbers and tenths like 78.4-3

hints: There are many ways to solve this problem. Let's see two ways we can solve it.

###Place Value

We can think in terms of tenths:

$\begin{align}
&\phantom{=}8.4 - 6\\\\
&=8.4 - 6.0\\\\
&=84\text{ tenths} - 60\text{ tenths}\\\\
&=24\text{ tenths}\\\\
&=2.4
\end{align}$

###Place value table

Let's line up the numbers by their decimal places. 

Ones | $.$ | Tenths
- | - | - | - | -
 $\blueE{8}$ |$.$ | $\blueE4$
 $\maroonD{6}$ | $.$ |$\maroonD0$

Now, let's subtract each place value column.

 | Ones | $.$ | Tenths
- | - | - | - | -
 | $\blueE{8}$ |$.$ | $\blueE4$
$-$  | $\maroonD6$ | $.$ | $\maroonD0$
 | $\underline{~~~~}$|  | $\underline{~~~~}$
| $2$| $.$ | $4$
There are many ways to solve this problem. Let's see two ways we can solve it.

$\begin{align}

&=9.1 - 7.0\\\\
&=91\text{ tenths} - 70\text{ tenths}\\\\
&=21\text{ tenths}\\\\
&=2.1
\end{align}$

###Place value table

Let's line up the numbers by their decimal places. 

Ones | $.$ | Tenths
- | - | - | - | -
 $\blueE{9}$ |$.$ | $\blueE1$
 $\maroonD{7}$ | $.$ |$\maroonD0$

Now, let's subtract each place value column.

 | Ones | $.$ | Tenths
- | - | - | - | -
 | $\blueE{9}$ |$.$ | $\blueE1$
$-$  | $\maroonD7$ | $.$ | $\maroonD0$
 | $\underline{~~~~}$|  | $\underline{~~~~}$
| $2$| $.$ | $1$
